quality_notes: Avoid repeating the phrase 'when it comes to' multiple times.

post_text:
📌 AI Search and Discovery
Nobody talks about how AI assistants really discover businesses and professionals from public web signals 🕵️.
Most people think it's just a matter of SEO keyword stuffing — but that's not how AI search works 🚫.
When it comes to Intent, most people try to guess what users might be looking for with vague keywords —
— what actually gets results is specific, well-structured queries that mirror real user needs 💡.
In terms of Signals, many attempt to inflate their profile with buzzwords and jargon —
— but clarity, expertise cues, and consistent evidence are what truly make a profile stand out 📈.
Intent | Signals | Evidence | Fit | Recommendation
  User asks  | Profile clarity  | Posts & outcomes  | Domain match  | Ranked results
Most Evidence sections are filled with empty claims and testimonials —
— what resonates with AI search is concrete, relevant examples and outcomes that demonstrate expertise 📊.
When it comes to Fit and Recommendation, many think it's just about being shown —
— but what matters is being ranked based on trust indicators and domain match, making it to the top of the results 🏆.
💬 Which AI discovery approach do you think is most effective:
1️⃣ Intent  2️⃣ Signals  3️⃣ Evidence  4️⃣ Fit  5️⃣ Recommendation
#AISearch #PersonalBranding #B2BDiscovery #AIAssistants #WebSignals 🚀💻
